# Vedge

> A single EHR platform for African healthcare — hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, medical labs, and diagnostic centres on one backbone, with a free companion mobile app for patients.

Vedge is built for Ghana first and expanding across Africa. Load-shedding aware, offline-first on the ward, submits NHIS and private-insurance claims during the visit (not at month-end), and priced against an African P&L — free base tiers for every pharmacy and lab, hospitals from ₵1,200/month. Founded in Accra.

Core differentiators:
- **One platform, every facility type.** A doctor orders a test, the lab runs it, the imaging centre reads the scan, the pharmacy dispenses the meds — all on the same backbone, claims flowing through in one ledger.
- **Claims at the point of care.** NHIS, private insurers, corporate schemes, and community plans — captured during the visit in the format each payer expects.
- **Works when the grid doesn't.** Offline charting, sync-on-return, printable fall-back for every chart.
- **Free patient app.** Every facility on Vedge is visible to every patient on the consumer mobile app — booking, results, prescriptions, telemedicine.

## About

- [Homepage](https://vedge.health): product overview, hero, marquee of shipped features
- [About Vedge](https://vedge.health/about): the thesis, the team, the Accra origin
- [Contact](https://vedge.health/contact): sales, support, and general enquiries

## Solutions (by facility type)

- [Hospitals & Clinics](https://vedge.health/solutions/hospitals-clinics): inpatient wards, MAR (medication administration record), admissions, NHIS claims, multi-specialty outpatient. Plans start at Vedge Clinic (₵1,200/mo) and scale to Vedge Enterprise (custom) for regional groups and ministries.
- [Medical Labs](https://vedge.health/solutions/medical-labs): test catalog, specimen tracking, Levey-Jennings QC, reagent-lot traceability, HL7 instrument interfaces, critical-result alerts. Free Essentials tier, Lab Pro at ₵1,500/mo, Lab Accredited at ₵4,500/mo.
- [Pharmacies](https://vedge.health/solutions/pharmacies): POS, inventory, NHIS claim capture, multi-branch chains, placement in the patient app when Vedge doctors prescribe nearby. Free Basic tier, Starter ₵149/mo, Plus ₵349/mo, Chain ₵699/mo per branch.
- [Diagnostic Centres](https://vedge.health/solutions/diagnostic-centers): imaging orders, modality worklist, radiologist reading tools, teleradiology-ready reporting, branded PDF reports. Starter ₵1,200/mo, Pro ₵3,500/mo, Enterprise ₵8,000/mo.

## Pricing

- [All plans & pricing](https://vedge.health/pricing): 10 paid plans across 4 facility verticals plus 1 free patient app. Monthly or annual (20% off annual). 30-day trials for hospital tiers, 14-day trials for lab and diagnostic tiers, no-trial free tiers on the base plans.
- **Founding customer programme**: the first 15 paying facilities get 40% off their first year.

## Companion apps

- [Vedge Staff](https://vedge.health/companions/vedge-staff): mobile companion for clinicians — charting, MAR, lab results, imaging worklist, offline sync. Works on iOS and Android.
- [Vedge for Patients](https://vedge.health/companions/vedge-patient): free consumer app — book appointments, view results, refill prescriptions, join teleconsults. Every Vedge facility is listed automatically.

## Partners

- [Design partners](https://vedge.health/partners): early-customer programme for hospitals, labs, and pharmacies who want to shape the roadmap. 40% founding discount, direct line to the team, quarterly design reviews.

## Optional

- Vedge Health is a private company. For press, investor, or regulatory enquiries use the [Contact](https://vedge.health/contact) page.
- Vedge integrates with NHIS, Paystack, Flutterwave, Africa's Talking (SMS), WhatsApp, Daily.co (teleconsult), and HL7-speaking lab analyzers. Integration lists per tier are on the pricing page.
